achievements.title: Damage Your Opponentos
achievements.description: Win via Normal Attack.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Right Back At Ya
achievements.description: Win via Reverse Attack.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Extra! Extra!
achievements.description: Win via Extra Attack.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: You're Fired
achievements.description: Win via Boss Attack.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Staring Death In The Face
achievements.description: Survive long enough in a single round for Death to appear.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Cover Fire
achievements.description: Fire a level 3 charge shot while your Boss Attack is active.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Show Them Who's Boss
achievements.description: Perform 3 or more Boss Attacks in one round.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Big Bucks
achievements.description: Collect 4 $ Coins in a row. These coins can be collected across multiple stages, as long as none are missed.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Max Bonus
achievements.description: Get 8 Perfect clears in a row.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Too Much Bonus
achievements.description: Get 9 Perfect clears in a row (and observe what happens to your score).
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Special Points
achievements.description: Get a chain of 33 or more hits.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Equivalent Exchange
achievements.description: Perform a Boss Attack by using a bomb.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Bring Light to the Darkness
achievements.description: Complete Story Mode.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Magical Sprite
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Load Ran.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Treasure Hunters
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Macky & Pentell.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Rocket Man
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Arthur Schmitt.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Beast Master
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Yan YanYung.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Mevious Bodyguards
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Griffon.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Dragon Star
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Realy Till.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Fairy Pair
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Tinker & Linker.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Strange Creatures
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Nanja Monja.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Dragon Cat Hermit
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Kim.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Princess of Light
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Sprites (select by highlighting Load Ran, then press Up, Up, Up, Up, A or B).
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Dark Sprite
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Dark Ran (select by highlighting Griffon, then press Down, Down, Down, Down, A or B).
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Lord of Darkness
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Mevious (select by highlighting Griffon, then press Up, Up, Up, Up, A or B).
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: The Queen of Light
achievements.description: Complete Character Mode with Memory (select by highlighting Load Ran, then press Down, Down, Down, Down, A or B).
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Blast-Free Zone
achievements.description: Complete Story Mode or Character Mode without using bombs.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.description: Complete Story Mode or Character Mode (Difficulty=Level 8 and Player=3 in soft dip settings).

achievements.title: You Must Be A Master To Get This Far
achievements.description: Complete Story Mode or Character Mode without continuing (Player=3 in soft dip settings).

achievements.title: Master of Shooting
achievements.description: Complete the game without continuing with a time of 4:30 or lower, a max chain of at least 25 hits, and at least 1,000,000 points.
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: Love Will Never Die
achievements.description: Complete Story Mode or Character Mode without losing a life (Player=3 in soft dip settings).
achievements.author: TheOpponent

achievements.title: You are PERFECT!
achievements.description: Complete Story Mode or Character Mode without losing a life (Difficulty=Level 8 and Player=3 in soft dip settings).
achievements.author: TheOpponent
